untranslatable_reason: This signal is a seasonal/calendar-based pattern that cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators and operators. It requires month-end calendar logic (end_of_february, end_of_july, end_of_december) which is not supported by the technical indicator set. The signal needs a custom calendar/temporal rule engine rather than price/volume/momentum indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_10 is a pure seasonal trading rule with no technical indicator conditions. It requires calendar date logic to identify end-of-month entry/exit points. Recommend implementing as a separate calendar-based rule type rather than a standard technical indicator backtest rule.
